args.prompt:
Extract all key merger-related information from the following 8-K filing filed December 18, 2023 by US Steel. Include: filing type, date, description of material definitive agreement with Nippon Steel, purchase price per share, total equity value, any stated premium, expected closing date, any conditions, and any statements about impact on business operations or stockholders. Output as structured facts with exact numbers and dates.

Document: {{us_steel_8k_dec18_2023}}

tool_calls.purpose: Extract merger details from 8-K filed Dec 18, 2023

args.prompt:
Extract all key merger-related information from the following Exhibit 99.1 (press release) attached to the December 18, 2023 8-K. Include: announcement date, parties, purchase price per share ($55.00), total equity value (~$14.9 billion including assumed debt), premium relative to recent trading, expected closing timeline, strategic rationale (e.g., 'Combined company will create a global leader'), any conditions or regulatory approvals mentioned, statements about US Steel's operations or employees.

Document: {{us_steel_ex99-1_dec18_2023}}

tool_calls.purpose: Extract merger details from press release exhibit

args.prompt:
Extract all key merger-related information from the following definitive proxy statement (DEF 14A) filed March 15, 2024 by US Steel. Include: voting matters, merger consideration ($55.00 per share), recommendation of board, any financial advisor opinions, valuations, fairness opinions, any conflicts of interest, conditions to closing, regulatory approvals, termination fees, and any statements about impact on business operations or employment.

Document: {{us_steel_def14a_mar15_2024}}

tool_calls.purpose: Extract merger details from proxy statement

args.prompt:
Extract all key merger-related information from the following 425 filing (Filing by certain foreign issuers under Rule 425) filed August 24, 2023 by US Steel. Note: This may be an earlier communication. Include: any statements about potential merger with Nippon Steel, strategic rationale, any preliminary terms, any operational impact mentions, and date of communication.

Document: {{us_steel_425_aug24_2023}}

tool_calls.purpose: Extract merger details from Rule 425 communication

args.prompt:
Extract all key merger-related information from the following 8-K filed April 2, 2024 by US Steel. Include: description of any material events, any updates on the merger with Nippon Steel, any statements about regulatory approvals, any changes to expected closing timeline, any impact on business operations, any new agreements or amendments.

Document: {{us_steel_8k_apr2_2024}}
